meaning: adj.八十岁的,八十多岁的n.八十岁,八十多岁
examples: Warren Buffet, the world's newest octogenarian billionaire, says he plans to work past 100.
You can maintain a clever, astute and erudite persona whether you're adolescent or octogenarian.
Warren Buffett, the world's newest octogenarian billionaire, has been beating the stock market for decades.
The Pope is an octogenarian, and though many 80-year-olds have switched to email, many have not.
The octogenarian, it turns out, has an uncanny gut for what plays in the digital world.
